title: Slater Determinants and Antisymmetry
description: Learn how the Pauli exclusion principle and fermionic antisymmetry are encoded in Slater determinants, the fundamental building blocks of electronic wavefunctions.
learningObjectives: Explain the antisymmetry requirement for fermionic wavefunctions
Understand how Slater determinants enforce the Pauli exclusion principle
Calculate overlap and matrix elements between Slater determinants
Connect determinant wavefunctions to quantum computing representations
